sns_enabled.description: Enable SNS-CORE notation for token optimization (60-85% reduction).

sns_pilot_chatdev.description: SNS-CORE pilot for ChatDev agent-to-agent communication only.

sns_metrics_collection.description: Collect token usage metrics for SNS vs traditional prompts.

chatdev_mcp_enabled.description: Expose ChatDev as MCP server for uniform agent coordination

testing_chamber_enabled.description: Allow Testing Chamber operations for isolated prototyping

consensus_mode_enabled.description: Multi-model consensus experiments across Ollama models
consensus_mode_enabled.note: Enabled: Ollama confirmed online (10 models) + lmstudio online

quantum_resolver_enabled.description: Quantum problem resolution for advanced self-healing

chatdev_tools_enabled.description: Allow ChatDev agents to invoke Hub utilities as tools

project_auto_index_enabled.description: Auto-index completed ChatDev projects to RAG/quest system

overnight_safe_mode.description: Restricted operations for autonomous overnight work

acl_enabled.description: Global ACL enforcement for sensitive integrations

chatdev_git_mode_enabled.description: Enable Git-aware ChatDev runs that commit generated projects

mcp_registry_enabled.description: Expose MCP registry/market JSON for orchestrator auto-routing

trust_artifacts_enabled.description: Enable artifact ledger + run manifest + replay bundle for every agent run

gateway_router_enabled.description: Enable universal LLM gateway and SwarmRouter facade over AgentRegistry/MCP

sandbox_runner_enabled.description: Enable per-task sandbox/containers for agent runs

planning_discipline_enabled.description: Enable dual-plan + early-test + cost/time telemetry scaffolding

mission_control_enabled.description: Enable Mission Control report generation and observability stubs

knowledge_reuse_enabled.description: Enable artifact ingest, pattern catalog, Three-Before-New checks

policy_audit_enabled.description: Enable safety preflight/policy/PII checks before risky actions

chatdev_ci_smoke_enabled.description: Allow slim ChatDev smoke tests via dockerized runner

mjolnir_protocol_enabled.description: Enable MJOLNIR Protocol unified agent dispatch (ask/council/parallel/chain/delegate/queue/status)
mjolnir_protocol_enabled.note: Wraps AgentTaskRouter + GuildBoard + SNS-Core behind single CLI. Per-request --sns flag; global sns_enabled NOT required.
